node.statement: (Perturbation preserves feasibility) Suppose for contradiction that there exists D ∈ ker φ_F, D ≠ 0. Since D ∈ span(F) ∩ ker φ_F, we have α_j(D) = 0 for all j. Therefore for any t ∈ R: α_j(x + tD) = α_j(x) + t·α_j(D) = b_j. So x + tD satisfies all affine constraints whenever it lies in V^+.
